en_title: Christopher Nolan Says Mainstream Movies That 'Play It Safe' Should Take More Risks if They Want to Succeed
cn_title: 诺兰：主流电影想成功就别走安全牌
subtitle: 求稳才是最大的风险
opus_summary: 克里斯托弗·诺兰接受《纽约时报》采访时表示，主流电影必须冒险，求稳反而最大风险。他以《奥本海默》近10亿美元(约合人民币68亿元)票房证明，观众渴望新鲜感，并回顾《记忆碎片》因大胆结构获认可。

paragraphs.en: The Odyssey director Christopher Nolan has a word of advice for filmmakers working on mainstream movies: "The biggest risk of all is to play it safe."
paragraphs.cn: 《奥德赛》导演克里斯托弗·诺兰给拍主流电影的影人一句忠告：「最大的风险就是求稳。」

paragraphs.en: The moviemaker behind time-bending films like Interstellar and Tenet offered his perspective on mainstream films and audiences during an interview with The New York Times . He cautioned filmmakers from shying away from traditional risks, saying that audiences will show up for films that offer something different.
paragraphs.cn: 这位曾执导《星际穿越》《信条》等时间扭曲电影的导演在接受《纽约时报》采访时分享了自己对主流电影和观众的看法。他告诫电影人不要回避传统意义上的风险，表示观众会为带来不同体验的作品买单。

paragraphs.en: "If you’re really interested in movies and the history of movies," Nolan said, "the one thing you see absolutely is that you have to take risks to succeed. The biggest risk of all is to play it safe.
paragraphs.cn: 诺兰说：「如果你真的热爱电影及其历史，就会发现一条铁律：想要成功必须冒险。而最大的风险就是求稳。」

paragraphs.en: "That’s what, consistently in mainstream movies, doesn’t work. The audience is looking for something new."
paragraphs.cn: 「在主流电影中，求稳从来就行不通。观众想看的是新鲜东西。」

paragraphs.en: Nolan didn't say which mainstream movies he had in mind, but it's hard to deny that Nolan has a group of die-hard fans who will turn out for even his most out-there projects. Oppenheimer , which retold the real-life story of atomic bomb creator J. Robert Oppenheimer in 2023, is the most recent example. The biopic pulled in a box office total just shy of $1 billion (via Box Office Mojo ) despite its non-linear structure and three-hour runtime.
paragraphs.cn: 诺兰没有点明他指的是哪些主流电影，但不可否认，他拥有一批铁杆粉丝，即便他拍出最离经叛道的作品也会捧场。2023年上映的《奥本海默》就是最近的例子，这部传记片讲述了原子弹之父J·罗伯特·奥本海默的真实故事，尽管采用非线性叙事且片长三小时，仍然斩获近10亿美元(约合人民币68亿元)的全球票房（数据来自Box Office Mojo）。

paragraphs.en: One example he brought to the discussion involved his 2000 picture, Memento. He recalled showing its script to his wife and producer, Emma Thomas, saying that she "responded well" to its backwards structure but felt "it was taking a lot of risk."
paragraphs.cn: 他提到的一个例子是2000年的影片《记忆碎片》。他回忆将剧本拿给妻子兼制片人艾玛·托马斯看时，她虽对倒叙结构「反应不错」，但也觉得「风险太大」。

paragraphs.en: "And I was able to say to her: No, I can do this," Nolan continued. "There are a lot of filmmakers who can do it in a more straightforward way. Actually having something new to bring to the table mitigates the risk, it gives you a way to distinguish yourself."
paragraphs.cn: 「我当时对她说：不，我能行。」诺兰接着说，「很多电影人可以用更直白的方式拍片。但真正拿出新东西反而会降低风险，让你脱颖而出。」

paragraphs.en: He then explained that he tried to sell the Memento script to "people who didn't get it," admitting she was "completely right." The film did eventually find a dedicated audience, though.
paragraphs.cn: 他接着解释，他曾试图把《记忆碎片》的剧本卖给「那些看不懂的人」，并承认妻子「完全说对了」。不过，这部电影最终还是找到了忠实的观众。

paragraphs.en: "The risk is the intermediaries — the financiers, the studio. If you can get to the audience — I mean, I’m not making any predictions for [The Odyssey], but in the past we’ve been well rewarded for having faith in the audience."
paragraphs.cn: 「风险在于中间环节——投资人、制片厂。如果能直面观众——话说我对《奥德赛》不做预测，但过去我们对观众的信任都获得了很好的回报。」

paragraphs.en: Nolan will return to theaters in July with The Odyssey, a nearly three-hour movie that serves as an adaptation of Homer's ancient Greek epic. It's set to premiere July 17, 2026. Scalpers have already started reselling tickets for hundreds of dollars .
paragraphs.cn: 诺兰将在今年7月携《奥德赛》重返大银幕，这部近三小时的电影改编自荷马的古希腊史诗，定于2026年7月17日首映。黄牛已经开始以数百美元(约合人民币数千元)的价格倒卖电影票了。
